name: Morphagene
description: Stereo tape and microsound buffer. Records up to 2.9 minutes per Reel at 48kHz/32-bit, divides audio into Splices, granulates them into Genes. Vari-Speed, Slide, Morph, and Organize deliver granular manipulation, time-stretch, and tape-speed effects.

controls.name: Gene-Size
controls.description: Nondestructively shrinks the playback window within the current Splice. Full CCW plays the whole Splice; turning CW extracts progressively smaller Genes down to microsound clicks.
controls.detail: CCW: full splice · CW: microsound grains

controls.name: Vari-Speed
controls.description: Bipolar playback speed and direction. 12:00 stops playback; CW speeds forward, CCW reverses. Higher resolution near center. Does not affect record speed.
controls.detail: ±12 semitones up · −26 down · Green LED = 1/1 · Blue = +1 oct · Peach = −1 oct

controls.name: Vari-Speed CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Vari-Speed CV input.
controls.detail: Bipolar · trims for 1V/oct when vsop option enabled

controls.name: Morph
controls.description: Sets overlap between consecutive Gene instances. Full CCW inserts silence between Genes; noon = seamless 1/1 loop; CW layers up to four overlapping Genes with random pitch and panning.
controls.detail: CCW: gaps · noon: 1/1 · CW: stacked layers + pan/pitch · opposite Vari-Speed LED shows state

controls.name: Slide
controls.description: Offsets where in the current Splice the first Gene begins playing. Continuously variable scrubbing across the captured audio, independent of Gene-Size.
controls.detail: Continuous · also changes Play Reset/Start point and EOSG position

controls.name: Slide CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Bipolar attenuator for Slide CV input.

controls.name: Organize
controls.description: Stepped selector for the next Splice to play. Current Splice plays to its end before the next Splice becomes active. In Reel Mode, selects the Reel to load.
controls.detail: Evenly distributed across Splices regardless of relative length

controls.name: Sound On Sound (S.O.S.)
controls.description: Combo pot. Unpatched: sets mix between live input and recorded loop. With signal patched to SOS CV IN: acts as attenuator for that CV. Full CCW during record allows clean sampling with no prior-loop feedback.
controls.detail: CCW: live only · CW: loop only · 0V–+8V CV range

controls.name: REC Button
controls.description: Starts/stops recording. Press alone: Time Lag Accumulate into current Splice. Hold REC + press Splice: record into new Splice at end of Reel. Hold REC + press Shift: Auto-Level (replaced by 4-step gain on MG203).
controls.detail: Illuminated · flashes while waiting for clock sync

controls.name: Splice Button
controls.description: Drops a Splice Marker at the current playback position. Lights at end of Splice/Gene. Hold Shift + Splice: delete current Splice Marker. Hold 3s with Shift: delete all markers.

controls.name: Shift Button
controls.description: Increments to next Splice. Also mounts microSD when unmounted. Flashes while SD card is busy writing — do not remove card when flashing.

inputs.name: Audio In L (Mono) / R
inputs.description: Stereo audio inputs, AC coupled. L is normalized to the R channel when R is unpatched. No analog gain pot — use Auto-Level (MG155) or 4-step gain (MG203).

inputs.name: Sound On Sound CV IN
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for S.O.S. parameter, linear response.

inputs.name: Gene-Size CV IN
inputs.description: Bipolar CV for Gene-Size. Through the attenuverter.

inputs.name: Vari-Speed CV Input
inputs.description: Bipolar CV for playback speed and direction. With vsop=1 firmware option and trimmed attenuverter: 1V/oct tracking.

inputs.name: Morph CV Input
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for Morph level, unity gain.

inputs.name: Slide CV Input
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for Slide position. Through the attenuverter.

inputs.name: Organize CV Input
inputs.description: Unipolar CV for Splice selection. Designed for sequencer ranges (5Vpp), narrower than other CVs. Unpatch in Reel Mode.

inputs.name: CLK Input
inputs.description: Clock/gate input. Syncs REC start/stop, drives Gene Shift or Time Stretch depending on Morph setting (or ckop firmware option).

inputs.name: Play Gate Input
inputs.description: Gate HIGH triggers/retriggers playback from start of current Splice. HIGH = loop; LOW = stop at end of splice. Slide offsets the start point.

inputs.name: REC Gate Input
inputs.description: Clock/gate toggles Record ON/OFF, enabling SOS overdubs at the rate of incoming pulses.

inputs.name: Splice Gate Input
inputs.description: Gate drops a Splice Marker at current playback position. Useful for rhythmic slicing against a clock.

inputs.name: Shift Gate Input
inputs.description: Gate increments Splice selection. Combines with Play input for step-through playback of percussive loops.

outputs.name: CV Output
outputs.description: Envelope follower of the audio output — voltage rises with louder output. Option cvop=1 changes it to a Gene-Size-timed ramp wave.

outputs.name: End of Splice / Gene Gate (EOSG)
outputs.description: Gate at the end of each Splice and each Gene. Fires more frequently as Gene-Size and Morph increase.

behaviors.name: Reels / Splices / Genes hierarchy
behaviors.description: A Reel holds up to 2.9 min of stereo audio. A Reel is divided by up to 299 Splice Markers into Splices. Each Splice is granulated by Gene-Size into Genes. Up to 32 Reels per microSD card (mg1.wav … mgw.wav).

behaviors.name: Time Lag Accumulate (TLA)
behaviors.trigger: REC Button press with existing Splice
behaviors.description: Overdubs onto the currently-selected Splice with SOS-controlled feedback. Combined with Gene-Size + Morph, builds slowly-evolving microsound textures. Vari-Speed <1/1 forward eventually loses signal.

behaviors.name: Record into New Splice
behaviors.description: Captures all audible manipulations (SOS, Vari-Speed, Slide, Morph) as a fresh Splice at the end of the Reel. Recording is always at fixed speed/direction — the manipulations become baked-in content.

behaviors.name: Time Stretch mode
behaviors.description: External clock drives Time Stretch/Compression. Vari-Speed controls pitch independently of time. Max clock ~18Hz; below 1 pulse/3.5s won't compress further. Morph Activity LED = Blue.

behaviors.name: Gene Shift mode
behaviors.description: Each clock pulse increments to the next Gene in the Splice, in chronological order. Modulate Vari-Speed and Gene-Size for evolving timbral shifts in sync with a clock. Morph LED = Red.

behaviors.name: Auto-Level / 4-step gain (MG203)
behaviors.description: MG155 analyzes incoming signal for a few seconds and sets optimal gain. MG203 replaces this with 4-step input gain: Blue −3dB, Green 0dB, Orange +6dB, Purple +12dB. Press Shift repeatedly to cycle.

behaviors.name: Reel Mode
behaviors.description: Enters Reel Mode — Organize and its CV select the Reel to load from the microSD card. Final (Pink/White pulsing) Reel is Empty: exit with it to create a new Reel. Hold Shift + REC while in Reel Mode to delete a Reel.

behaviors.name: Sound On Sound crossfader
behaviors.description: With no signal patched to Audio In, SOS becomes a voltage-controlled crossfader between silence and the loop — functions as a VCA for the loop via the SOS CV input.

behaviors.name: options.txt firmware tweaks
behaviors.description: SD card stores per-option flags: vsop (1V/oct Vari-Speed), inop (input-only recording = delay mode), omod (immediate Organize), gnsm (extended Gene smoothing), rsop (record-button inversion), pmod (momentary/trigger Play), ckop (force Shift or Stretch mode), cvop (envelope vs ramp CV out), and mcr1–3 (Morph chord ratios).

behaviors.name: Organize stepping behavior
behaviors.description: Organize waits for the currently-playing Splice/Gene to finish before switching, generating EOSG at the handoff. Option omod=1 makes Organize and Shift switch immediately regardless of playback position (may introduce clicks).

patchIdeas.name: Classic 1/1 loop playback
patchIdeas.patch: Record a phrase into a Splice and play it back at original speed/length — Morphagene as a simple stereo looper.
steps: Gene-Size full CCW (plays the whole Splice, not grains).
Morph at noon (Amber LED = 1/1 seamless loop, no overlaps, no gaps).
Vari-Speed at 2:30 (Green LED = 1/1 forward playback).
S.O.S. full CW (all loop, no live input in the output).
Patch sound source → Audio In L.
Hold REC + press Splice to capture a new Splice. Hit REC again to stop recording.
Patch Audio Out L → your output.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — the captured Splice looping forward at 1/1, ~10Vpp.
patchIdeas.hear: The recorded phrase playing back seamlessly at its original speed and length. Turn Vari-Speed for pitched/reversed playback; Morph CW for overlapping Genes.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Gene-Size: full CCW
* Morph: noon (1/1)
* Vari-Speed: 2:30 (Green)
* S.O.S.: full CW

- Sound Source (Out) -> Morphagene (Audio In L)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked Gene Shift
patchIdeas.patch: With CLK patched and Morph below 2/1, each clock pulse steps chronologically through Genes within the Splice.
steps: Record a Splice you want to chop (voice, melody, loop) into the Reel.
Gene-Size ~2 o'clock so each Gene is a short chunk rather than the full Splice.
Morph ~10 o'clock (Red LED = Gene Shift mode). Stay below noon.
Patch a clock (8th or 16th notes) → CLK In. Each pulse advances one Gene.
Patch a slow LFO → Slide CV and set its attenuverter to ~1 o'clock to sweep the Gene start point over time.
Patch Audio Out L → output.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — chronologically-stepped Genes, ~10Vpp, one new Gene per clock pulse.
patchIdeas.hear: The recorded Splice becomes a beat-synced stutter that marches forward one chunk at a time. The Slide LFO smears the chop points across the Splice for evolving timbre.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Gene-Size: ~2:00
* Morph: 10:00 (Red, Gene Shift)

- Clock (Out) c> Morphagene (CLK In)
- LFO (Out) >> Morphagene (Slide CV)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Time-stretch dub
patchIdeas.patch: Push Morph past 2/1 and an incoming clock stretches or compresses the Splice — Vari-Speed changes pitch only.
steps: Record a melodic or vocal Splice into the Reel.
Morph to 3 o'clock (Blue LED = Time Stretch mode).
Vari-Speed noon stops normal playback; the clock drives the playhead now.
Patch a slow clock (e.g. 1 pulse per beat) → CLK In. Slow it down to stretch the phrase longer.
Patch a VCO LFO or an external CV → Vari-Speed CV to transpose independent of time.
Patch Audio Out L → output.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — the Splice stretched to the clock rate, ~10Vpp, pitch set independently by Vari-Speed.
patchIdeas.hear: A vocal or phrase that drags on for bars without pitch-shifting. Bend Vari-Speed and the pitch slides while the stretched phrase continues underneath — classic dub/granular feel.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Morph: 3:00 (Blue, Time Stretch)
* Vari-Speed: noon (pitch control)

- Clock (Out) c> Morphagene (CLK In)
- Source (Out) -> Morphagene (Audio In L)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Four-Gene stacking blur
patchIdeas.patch: Morph full CW stacks up to four overlapping Genes with random pitch and pan — a wall of disintegrating sound.
steps: Pre-record a textural source (Wogglebug + Erbe-Verb, or any noisy layered patch) into a Splice.
Gene-Size at ~1 o'clock so Genes are bite-sized, not the full Splice.
Morph full CW (4 Genes, random pitch and panning applied automatically).
Vari-Speed 2:30 (1/1 forward) as a baseline.
S.O.S. full CW so you're hearing the loop, not the live input.
Patch Audio Out L → output L, Audio Out R → output R.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L/R — stereo cloud of four overlapping Genes at random pitches and pans, ~10Vpp.
patchIdeas.hear: A disintegrating wash — the source recognizable, but scattered across pitch and stereo. Pull Morph back toward noon to gradually collapse the cloud into a clean loop.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Gene-Size: ~1:00
* Morph: full CW (4 Genes, random pitch/pan)
* Vari-Speed: 2:30
* S.O.S.: full CW

- Wogglebug (Ring Mod) -> Erbe-Verb (In)
- Erbe-Verb (Out) -> Morphagene (Audio In L)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (L)
- Morphagene (Audio Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Touch-sliced sample player
patchIdeas.patch: Pressure Points gates Play and its Y output selects the Splice — each touch plays a different slice.
steps: Record several Splices into the Reel so Organize has targets to pick from.
Gene-Size full CCW (play the whole Splice per touch).
Vari-Speed 2:30 (1/1 forward).
Patch Pressure Points Gate Out → Morphagene Play Gate.
Patch Pressure Points Tuned Voltage Out Y (0–5V row) → Morphagene Organize CV.
Patch Morphagene Audio Out L → output.
Press a touchplate — Play retriggers and Y voltage selects which Splice loads.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — whichever Splice the Y voltage currently selects, ~10Vpp, retriggered per touch.
patchIdeas.hear: Each touch fires a different sample from your Reel. Tune the Y voltages on each Pressure Points channel to pick your four favourite Splices for performance.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Gene-Size: CCW (full splice)
* Organize: CV-controlled

- Pressure Points (CH 4 Gate) g> Morphagene (Play Gate)
- Pressure Points (Tuned Voltage Out Y) >> Morphagene (Organize CV)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Beat-synced stutter stepper
patchIdeas.patch: A percussive loop chopped into 16 Splices marches one Splice per clock pulse while Play retriggers on the downbeat.
steps: Record a percussive loop into one Splice. Then use a clock at 16 pulses per bar into Splice Gate to drop 15 more Splice markers evenly across it.
Gene-Size full CCW so each Splice plays in full.
Morph noon (1/1 loop).
Vari-Speed 2:30 (1/1 forward).
Patch the master clock → Shift Gate (advances to next Splice each pulse).
Patch clock ÷2 → Play Gate (retriggers the current Splice every two pulses).
Patch Audio Out L → output.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — one Splice per pulse, retriggered every other pulse, ~10Vpp.
patchIdeas.hear: A chopped drum loop that marches forward slice by slice, retriggering so short slices ring out twice. Slow the clock to freeze on a slice and repeat.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Gene-Size: CCW
* Morph: noon

- Clock (Out) c> Morphagene (Shift Gate)
- Clock ÷2 (Out) g> Morphagene (Play Gate)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Input-only delay (inop=1)
patchIdeas.patch: With options.txt inop=1, Morphagene becomes an always-recording delay — the Splice length sets the delay time.
steps: Power off. On the microSD, edit options.txt and set inop=1 (input-only mode). Save and reinsert.
Create one short empty Splice — its length will be the delay time.
S.O.S. to noon — acts as wet/dry mix now.
Vari-Speed 2:30 (1/1 forward).
Patch source audio → Audio In L.
Patch Audio Out L → output.
Patch a slow LFO → Vari-Speed CV, attenuverter at ~11 o'clock, for pitched echoes.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Audio Out L — dry+delayed audio, ~10Vpp, delay time = Splice length.
patchIdeas.hear: A single-tap delay whose pitch wobbles with the Vari-Speed LFO. Play live into it and Morphagene echoes back with chorus/vibrato character.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morphagene:
* Firmware option: inop=1
* Splice: short empty splice as delay length
* S.O.S.: noon (wet/dry)

- Source (Out) -> Morphagene (Audio In L)
- Morphagene (Audio Out L) -> Output (In)
- LFO (Out) >> Morphagene (Vari-Speed CV) // pitched echoes
